server_manual.title: Server Manual & Setup Guide
server_manual.intro: Follow this guide to download, configure, and start your first InnerFX gaming server environment.
server_manual.step1_desc: Navigate to the {link} section and download the build matching your host operating system (Windows zip or Linux tar.xz).
server_manual.step2_desc: Extract the downloaded archive into a dedicated directory (e.g., C:/innerfx-server or /home/innerfx/server). Ensure read/write directory permissions are set.
server_manual.step3_desc: Create a file named server.config.json or use our online portal generator. Configure ports, max clients, and server database connections.
server_manual.step4_desc: Execute run.bat on Windows or ./run.sh on Linux to boot up the environment. Ensure appropriate port forwarding (default port: 30120).
server_manual.under_construction_desc: The section {section} is currently under construction. Please check back later.
